testsuite.name: org.example.oddventure.domain.match.unit.MatchServiceCacheTest

testcase.name: 종료된 경기 상세 조회 캐싱 성능 비교

exists users cascade Hibernate: create table bet (bet_amount numeric(38,2) not null, is_deleted boolean, is_win boolean not null, odds_at_betting numeric(38,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, match_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, user_id bigint not null, selected_team enum ('Team_A','Team_B') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table hot_keywords (is_deleted boolean, search_count integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, keyword varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table "match" (is_deleted boolean, total_amounta numeric(38,2) not null, total_amountb numeric(38,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), end_time timestamp(6), fetch_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, start_time timestamp(6) not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, view_count bigint not null, loser varchar(255), match_name varchar(255) not null, team_a varchar(255) not null, team_b varchar(255) not null, winner varchar(255), status enum ('FINISHED','ONGOING','SCHEDULED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table team (id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table users (is_deleted boolean, point numeric(38,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, password varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null, user_role enum ('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_USER') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists bet add constraint FK4eonx2b3kaqryea8jm5ddor5o foreign key (match_id) references "match" Hibernate: alter table if exists bet add constraint
